classes.title: sama vinyasa
classes.description: Our traditional flow with focus and fun. Sun salutations, a little heat, a lot of heart. Tap back into a sense of play with our signature flow.

classes.title: sama open
classes.description: A mindful pace to open and stretch. Movement, breathwork, meditation with expert adaptations offered for a myriad of levels.

classes.title: sama sculpt
classes.description: Using ergonomic, light weights and a yoga flow, we refine, define, stretch and tone. Get in your best shape with Sama Sculpt!

classes.title: sama yin flow
classes.description: Slow and steady. Breath work, supported poses and sometimes longer holds to restore and stimulate the relaxation response. Much of Yin is done seated or prone.

classes.title: sama core
classes.description: Strengthen from within. Focused core work through mindful movement and breath to support stability, posture, and a resilient, balanced body.

classes.title: sama stretch
classes.description: Lengthen and release. Gentle, intentional movement to improve mobility, reduce tension, and create a sense of lightness and freedom in the body.
classes.imageStyle: object-position: 22% 88%; transform: scale(1.5); transform-origin: left bottom

classes.title: sama strength
classes.description: Build and empower. Controlled, functional strength training to increase muscle, support bone health, and enhance confidence in how you move and live.

classes.title: sama restore
classes.description: Rest and renew. Supported poses, breathwork, and stillness to deeply calm the nervous system, replenish energy, and invite lasting restoration.
